name: decentralized-education
description: A decentralized education platform for learning Web3, blockchain, and open-source development

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev && npx prisma generate

author: Decentralized Education Team
